about: The basis of the Frozen Template Constructor: a small set of VETTED frozen bricks the composer assembles by file copy + token substitution (ZERO code generation). A request is matched against a primitive's envelope (100%-fit on every axis or it is not that primitive). Authoritative strategy: CRUD-DOCS/workspace-standards/frozen-template-constructor.md.

source.about: Where the children list comes from. files/db-at-build => static output; runtime => dynamic.

depth.about: Structural nesting (hub levels). Recursive parameter of one skeleton.

rendering.about: static = SSG/ISR pages; dynamic-descriptor = rules/context spec, not pages (when static is impossible).

roles.about: Access, embedded identically into every layout level. ALL_ROLES (enforced tiers + business RBAC).

confirm.about: Shared order-sheet texts (step 167). The confirmation layer renders human lines from RESOLVED values using these labels; the model relays them VERBATIM and never invents its own wording. Per-primitive: category (logical plane: structure | design) + tools (companion entities the group type requires — set automatically, never asked). admin/dashboard are MANDATORY per-group questions: absent from the plan => the tool returns needs_input with these exact texts.

en.publicGuest: everyone (guests get an account on first action)

ru.publicGuest: всем (гость получает аккаунт при первом действии)

admin.en: Do you plan an ADMIN PANEL for this group of pages (a private, admin-role page for managing its content)? Answer yes/no.
admin.ru: Предполагаете ли вы АДМИНИСТРАТИВНУЮ ПАНЕЛЬ для этой группы страниц (закрытая страница с ролью администратора для управления её содержимым)? Ответьте да/нет.

dashboard.en: Do you plan USER DASHBOARDS for this group of pages (a personal dynamic dashboard/[userId] page per user)? Answer yes/no.
dashboard.ru: Предполагаете ли вы ПОЛЬЗОВАТЕЛЬСКИЕ ДАШБОРДЫ для этой группы страниц (персональная динамическая страница dashboard/[userId] для каждого пользователя)? Ответьте да/нет.

admin.en: An admin panel is a private, role-gated page where the owner/manager maintains this group's content (for a store — its assortment). Building it is a separate later capability; right now the answer is only RECORDED in the group manifest.
admin.ru: Админ-панель — закрытая страница (роль администратора), где владелец/менеджер управляет содержимым этой группы (у магазина — ассортиментом). Само создание — отдельная будущая разработка; сейчас ответ только ЗАПИСЫВАЕТСЯ в манифест группы.

dashboard.en: User dashboards are a dynamic dashboard/[userId]/ layer — a personal page per user for this group. Building it is a separate later capability; the answer is only RECORDED now.
dashboard.ru: Пользовательские дашборды — динамический слой dashboard/[userId]/: персональная страница каждого пользователя для этой группы. Само создание — отдельная будущая разработка; сейчас ответ только ЗАПИСЫВАЕТСЯ.

primitives.displayName: Flat file-backed list (news / blog / docs feed)
primitives.matching: BASE axes (source, depth, rendering) SELECT this primitive — all must equal the request. ASPECT axes (i18n, roles) are toggles this primitive SUPPORTS — a request may set them (e.g. roles=user turns the gate ON); an aspect not listed here => refuse 'aspect X unsupported'. A base axis mismatch => refuse naming that axis.

providers.about: Build-time DB query → static output. Roadmap brick; contract only.

aspects.about: Per-[lang] routing + per-tab UI chrome (EN fallback per key). The always-on content aspect.

Access gate injected uniformly into the tab layout. Three shapes (HOW-USE-AUTH.md): public (off) | public+guest (roles=guest) | private (roles=<ALL_ROLES csv> or all). DEFAULT off. Turning ON injects the SHARED client guard (@/lib/auth-guard/route-guard.client, static-first preserved) wrapping children + a fallback redirect (unauthorizedRedirect) for visitors lacking the role; no other change. Server-hide variant (role-guard.server.tsx, dynamic) is the documented architect-only exception, not injected.

roadmap: (files × depth-2)  — docs-by-category, when proven by live development
dynamic-descriptor — when a structure genuinely cannot be static
